use_cases: Displaying status indicators with color-coded variants
Showing notification counts on UI elements
Marking items with secondary or destructive states
Creating reusable label components across applications
ai_summary: A versatile Badge component built with class-variance-authority providing multiple style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying status indicators, tags, and labels. Designed as a reusable atomic component with hover states and ring focus accessibility.
